hooks.command: FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; EXT="${FILE##*.}"; case "$EXT" in ts|tsx|js|jsx) npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null ;; py) ruff format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null ;; esac; exit 0
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE '(npm publish|git tag|docker push)'; then echo 'WARN: This publishes externally. Confirm with user first.' >&2; fi; exit 0
